title: Resonance
description: A core mod implementing common features for other mods I'm working on.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b887b21e6626195465b06b5d0e5dd8c46975bfbd.png)
The Resonance Mod is a hopefully rather vanilla style mod with a variety of features. This is a core mod used in a variety of child mods in development.

Current Features:
- Additional uses for amethyst including Reverberations, Rain Chimes, Whistling Arrows, & Rock Candy 
- Deep Sea Bathyal Zones filled with Hydrothermal Vents, Tube Worms, & Volcano Snails
- Growable potion imbued Pearls for reusable potion effects
- Icicles, Pearly Ice, and Ice Fur that make blocks Brittle
- Tinted Bottles for containing volatile substances
- Decorative blocks: Compost Heaps, Treasure Hoards, and Book Piles
- Orbs that grant an addtional jump to the player when touched
- 4 new paintings
- 4 Scarfs with varying utilities
- 2 new enchantments: Sparking & Curse of Recoiling
- Two new recipe types: reverberating or lightning striking dropped items
- A couple new structure systems for generating structures that only spawn once per world or at fixed coordinates
- A tag for 'Unique Items' that makes them impossible to destroy, despawn, or loose to the void
- Five new effects: Sparking, Soul Fatigue, Crushing Weight, Double Jump & Strong Double Jump. And brewing recipes for Darkness, and Levitation
- Player Attributes for double jumping and wall jumping
